summary: Frontend testing for Koontitarjous (summary offer) feature and Undo/Redo functionality. All requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent} - accessibility warning in console

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: KoontitarjousDialog.js - parseProjectJSON correctly handles both old and new JSON formats
VERIFIED: KoontitarjousDialog.js - mergeOperations correctly merges identical operations by key (label|unit|pricePerUnit)
VERIFIED: App.js (lines 116-140) - Undo/Redo with saveToUndoStack, handleUndo, handleRedo properly implemented
VERIFIED: Toolbar.js (lines 214-259) - Undo/Redo buttons have data-testid='undo-button' and data-testid='redo-button'
VERIFIED: export.js (lines 715-1067) - exportKoontitarjousPDF generates professional PDF with merged operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Koontitarjous feature fully functional. Test files produce expected merged total of 3,629.75 EUR with 4 unique line items after merging identical operations from 2 projects.

tests_executed.details: Button data-testid='create-koontitarjous-button' opens dialog with data-testid='koontitarjous-dialog'

tests_executed.test: Koontitarjous: Upload multiple project JSON files
tests_executed.details: File input data-testid='koontitarjous-file-input' accepts multiple .json files, both test files loaded successfully showing green checkmark indicators

tests_executed.test: Koontitarjous: JSON parsing and validation works
tests_executed.details: parseProjectJSON extracts project names (Kerros 1 - Olohuone, Kerros 2 - Makuuhuoneet), operations, and calculates totals correctly

tests_executed.test: Koontitarjous: Identical operations are merged correctly
tests_executed.details: 6 total operations from 2 projects merged to 4 unique rows - Kattomaalaus 2x and Seinämaalaus 2x merged by key (label|unit|pricePerUnit)

tests_executed.test: Tee tarjous dialog still works correctly
tests_executed.details: Button data-testid='create-tarjous-button' opens Luo tarjous dialog with all form fields

tests_executed.test: Undo/Redo buttons are visible and have data-testid
tests_executed.details: data-testid='undo-button' and data-testid='redo-button' present, both correctly disabled when no actions to undo/redo
Buttons data-testid='save-project-button' and data-testid='load-project-button' present and functional

notes: All 9 requested features verified. The app is 100% client-side with no backend APIs. Minor accessibility warning for DialogContent components (missing aria-describedby) - does not affect functionality.
